name: playwright-python
description: Python Playwright helpers for browser automation, scraping, and website workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Browser automation and scraping with Python Playwright.
interface.longDescription: A starter plugin for opening websites, scraping content, and automating browser workflows with Python Playwright.
defaultPrompt: Open a site and capture the key data.
Scrape a table and export the rows.
Automate a login and screenshot the result.
